infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is used to scan QR codes and capture maintenance photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is used to record voice notes and video with audio.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access lets you attach existing photos to maintenance requests.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to allow you upload images/videos of maintenance issues.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to let you capture photos/videos of maintenance issues.

plugins.microphonePermission: The app accesses your microphone to record voice notes of maintenance issues.

plugins.cameraPermission: The app uses your camera to scan asset QR codes and capture maintenance photos/videos.
